75246.subject: 𝕏 Money just launched with 6% APY and a Visa Card. Stripe, Apple Pay, and your bank have a problem 😳💳; SoFi’s Q…
75246.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/fintechpulse1095

Hey Everyone,
Good morning & happy Tuesday! Today, we’re diving into 𝕏 Money, which just launched with 6% APY (what it’s all about, how it ties with 𝕏 Super App play & why Stripe, Apple Pay, and your bank have a problem + bonus deep dive into SpaceX, which is an all ecompassing Elon’s ecosystem [ https://substack.com/redirect/b3bdca09-1318-49f3-a6b1-6bb1e44e4fc0?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] & The Founder’s Playbook for Winning in the AI Age [ https://substack.com/redirect/c52f6696-b594-47a8-960f-6b73347c1e44?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside), and SoFi, the Everything App that’s finally becoming an everything earner (deep dive into SoFi’s Q1 2026, breaking the most importat financial facts & figures to see if it’s worth your time and money + bonus deep dives into Robinhood [ https://substack.com/redirect/50f6b9c8-4935-4436-9d54-6b58f10bd4ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] & Coinbase [ https://substack.com/redirect/be907aad-e9c3-4995-a451-130d4c578aab?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside). So let’s just jump straight into the good stuff 🌶️
𝕏 Money just launched with 6% APY and a Visa Card. Stripe, Apple Pay, and your bank have a problem 😳💳
The BIG News 🔥 Elon Musk just turned 600 million timelines into bank branches, and the economics make more sense than they look at first glance.
𝕏 Money went live late last week with a 6% APY on cash balances, a metal Visa debit card, instant peer-to-peer transfers, and FDIC insurance up to $10 million.
The yield alone beats every high-yield savings account in the U.S. But the yield is the distraction, not the strategy.
What happens when a platform with 600 million users and near-zero customer acquisition costs decides it doesn’t need to profit from your deposits the way JPMorgan or Goldman does?
Stripe can’t match those economics. Neither can any neobank on the market.
Let’s take a closer look at this, break down the economics behind the 6%, and what 𝕏 Money’s launch means for Visa, Stripe, Apple Pay, and every bank in America...

Unsubscribe https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5hcy5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWN0aW9uL2Rpc2FibGVfZW1haWw_.icILeQia8-bZA4asuaTvvmzHDcDorQB7muOgb0D4OjM?

75236.subject: Strategy Authorizes $1.25B in Bitcoin Sales
75236.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

* **[Strategy’s](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/strategy-authorizes-up-to-usd1-25b-of-bitcoin-sales-as-saylor-formalizes-capital-pivot)**[ never-sell era ends](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/strategy-authorizes-up-to-usd1-25b-of-bitcoin-sales-as-saylor-formalizes-capital-pivot)

* **[BNY](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/bny-usdc-institutional-custody-platform-circle-partnership)**[ makes USDC the first stablecoin on its custody platform](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/bny-usdc-institutional-custody-platform-circle-partnership)

* **[BlackRock](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/blackrock-adds-ethena-s-synthetic-dollar-to-its-usd20t-aladdin-risk-management-platform)**[ adds Ethena's USDe to its $20T risk platform](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/blackrock-adds-ethena-s-synthetic-dollar-to-its-usd20t-aladdin-risk-management-platform)

* [Cosmos Labs Acquires Mintscan and Team (Partner) ](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/cosmos-labs-acquires-mintscan-cosmos-korea-expansion)

* **[CFTC](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/cftc-expands-polymarket-probe-staged-trades-fake-wins)**[ expands its Polymarket probe ](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/cftc-expands-polymarket-probe-staged-trades-fake-wins)

* **[DraftKings](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/draftkings-launches-proprietary-prediction-markets-exchange-dkex)**[ launches a prediction-markets exchange](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/draftkings-launches-proprietary-prediction-markets-exchange-dkex)

* [Inside DTCC's Move to Stellar (Partner)](https://thedefiant.io/education/explainers/dtcc-stellar-tokenization-dtc-custodied-assets-explainer)

**Michael Saylor built Strategy on one promise: it would never sell bitcoin**. On Monday, the company authorized selling up to $1.25 billion of it.

The board [cleared Strategy to sell bitcoin](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/strategy-authorizes-up-to-usd1-25b-of-bitcoin-sales-as-saylor-formalizes-capital-pivot) to fund its **STRC** preferred dividend, now raised to **12%**, along with debt interest and stock buybacks. The authorization formalizes a pivot that began when the company [sold 32 bitcoin in May](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/strategy-sells-32-bitcoin-fund-preferred-dividends-first-sale-since-2022), its first sale since 2022. It follows Thursday's milestone, when Strategy's [enterprise mNAV fell below 1](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/strategy-enterprise-mnav-drops-below-1-first-time) for the first time, pushing the combined value of its debt, preferred, and equity above its **847,363-BTC** treasury and closing the equity-accretion channel that funded the buying spree.

Selling was the one outcome the whole structure was built to avoid. The preferred shares and convertible debt were sold on the premise that bitcoin would only be accumulated, with equity issued above net asset value to buy more. Funding dividends by selling the asset inverts that logic. The ope

75235.subject: Defender discontinuation effective June 30 (ACTION REQUIRED)
75235.body:
This is a reminder that Defender will be permanently retired on July 1, 2026, one day from now.

Dear Oleg,

This is a final reminder that the OpenZeppelin Defender platform will be permanently discontinued on June 30, 2026. After 23:59 UTC on that date, the Defender web application, its APIs, Relayers, Monitors and all associated hosted services will be shut down and permanently deleted. Please read this email carefully.

IF YOU DO NOT TAKE IMMEDIATE ACTION, YOU WILL PERMANENTLY LOSE ACCESS TO ANY INTEGRATIONS THAT MAY BE ASSOCIATED WITH YOUR DEFENDER ACCOUNT, INCLUDING RELATED GAS TOKENS, SMART CONTRACTS, OR OTHER DATA OR CONFIGURATIONS.

As one day now remains, we ask that you complete the actions described below before the discontinuation date to avoid disruption or loss.

What is happening

As we informed you in our prior notices, OpenZeppelin is discontinuing the Defender Services on June 30, 2026. Discontinuation of the Services (as defined in our Terms of Service available at openzeppelin.com/tos (https://cXwgv04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/LY+113/cXwgv04/VWxC4w2DtP84W8n_6qp8PXt4GW6TYKFS5QW181N63y6n63lcq-W6N1vHY6lZ3mKN2lQ3sC2JK5_W3w6q9D1mG6_rW8GbYjK8SBFHwW3zzTQM8PwQpJVd3NWG1DH9wLW71rtK46LClb1VQsXMQ1C0QVVW2fg8_18p3klNW3j9b0L1hVYknW7kP_JT5m4lDJW575bHG2xvDFdW7jHXtK1T9N9PN1spj0bhLBK9W3JLXXV4np6FHN46p5SXtM0HKW1G983M6C2Y44W2ZqxLD61WN0gW34k6fH5DFxmLW2wXw-Q80MGPbW1Kpn7y3TJs8SW7VFpzG1NwQLjVHC4Ny1bn0Ntf3lxPw604 ) ) will result in the permanent loss of your Service Inputs and Service Outputs, including, without limitation, Relayers, Monitors, Notifications, Actions/Autotasks, Sentinels, transaction proposals, address books, and any data, tokens, gas tokens, smart contracts, integrations and configurations stored in, or otherwise associated with, your Defender account.

You remain solely responsible for withdrawing any tokens in, and for managing access to, any smart contracts or blockchain accounts you have integrated with Defender, including gas tokens associated with a Relayer that was created by you using your Defender account. OpenZeppelin cannot manage, withdraw, or recover any such tokens, smart contracts, or other integrations on your behalf.

If you do not take action prior to June 30, 2026 access will be permanently lost.

Open source migration path

This migration guide (https://cXwgv04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/LY+113/cXwgv04/VWxC4w2DtP84W8n_6qp8PXt4GW6TYKFS5QW181N63y6nq3lcq-W7lCdLW6lZ3lJW7y59-h1cYs0-VvQBPR6_dw5WW8hGwr83kRsl-W2QRgPk9565vzW1qrwJw8zTP6gV79S9J6kLzNZW6s7TLC5xTvwwW2LFQTY5P9my3W6xNrdB8q13szW2cXQL45bwrdTW956Jwb8JZg5dW2fbM7J5BNgVPW96cwk72c1s-RW4WKB381XQQj3W4Pn6tt3WlLbgW7MbPWP8mx509W5c3bvw64ctGMN46vm5LMlSdNW8HV-VP2jHnHfW7SXqw32bl8qLW7Z_78Q5DyMykW1FFQDB8nywp_W2VMFJT5RXWmsW5KP3pm7bp92Mf44LDT004 ) covers everything you need to move to our open-source tools (Monitor and Relayer): one-click config export from the Defender UI, step-by-step video walkthroughs, SDK migration examples, and support for running both systems i
